Bash(git -C /mnt/c/Users/chefa/InTransparency commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add student skill-path, recruiter dashboard APIs, and subscription improvements

- Add student skill-path feature with career comparison, hireability gauge, skill radar, and roadmap components
- Create real API routes for recruiter dashboard \(analytics, candidates, jobs, saved searches, settings, talent analytics, search\)
- Add university campus and batch project API routes
- Refactor recruiter dashboard pages to use real API data instead of mock data
- Update subscription/pricing system with revised tiers and Stripe integration improvements
- Add API key management and support ticket endpoints
- Update Prisma schema with new models and relations
- Update en/it translations for new features

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(sample jobs matching Y to show how the platform works"
- Real DB results always take priority when they exist
- University tab tries both sample types if primary is empty

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

fix: AI search — stop showing fake sample jobs, be honest about empty results

Instead of falling back to hardcoded sample data when no real listings
exist, the demo now honestly says "there are currently no positions
matching X on the platform" and invites users to register for notifications.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)
